Web testing and crawler-test.com documentation. The URL format /status_codes/404 returns 404 (resource not found). The correct format is /status_codes/status_404 which returns 404 (status code response).
Web testing. The format /status_codes/200 returns 404. The correct format per crawler-test.com documentation is /status_codes/status_200 which returns 200 OK.
Web testing and crawler-test.com documentation. The URL /status_codes/301 does not exist (returns 404). The correct path for 301 redirects is /redirects/redirect_1 which returns 301 status code.
Web testing. The format /status_codes/404 returns 404 (not found). The correct format is /status_codes/status_404 which returns 404 (status code response).
Web testing. The format /status_codes/500 returns 500 Server Error (correct by accident). The documented correct format per crawler-test.com is /status_codes/status_500.

privileged_info_summary: Task uses synthetic data created by setup_task.sh. File paths verified: sitemap created at /home/ga/Documents/SEO/sitemaps/draft_sitemap.xml, exports expected at /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/sitemap_audit_data.csv, report at /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/sitemap_remediation.txt. CRITICAL FINDING: The metadata URLs are incorrect. Crawler-test.com uses /status_codes/status_[CODE] format (e.g., status_200, status_404, status_500) for HTTP status code testing, not /status_codes/[CODE]. For 301 redirects, the correct endpoint is /redirects/redirect_1, not /status_codes/301. The sitemap created contains 5 URLs using the wrong format.
